policy: No test file may remain under test/pending for final QA. Every skipped/gated test file must have owner, launch risk, reason, action, and verification before final QA can be claimed.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: CSRF suite is skipped in the default test environment.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run under a non-test security smoke before security claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Security headers are part of launch trust proof.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Keep in default security suite and rerun for release.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Rate limiting is part of launch trust proof.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Keep in default security suite and rerun for release.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Browser/render suite is gated on local browser availability.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run in browser/e2e lane before render launch claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Sandbox suite is skipped under CI or unavailable CDN.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run in slow/browser lane before sandbox claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Dual LLM integration is skipped in CI or without local backend.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run only for live-provider/local-backend claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Renderer integration is gated on browser/CDN availability.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run in slow/browser lane before renderer claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Three route/persona/code-extraction assertions are explicitly skipped.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Unskip before claiming production-ready swarm output.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Self-improve e2e is skipped in CI.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run before self-improve workflow launch claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Guardrail generation tests skip without configured LLM.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run with provider config before live guardrail claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Cloud provider smoke is gated behind RUN_CLOUD_MODEL_TESTS.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for live-provider release claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Cloud full-loop tests require live credentials.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for cloud provider launch claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Model comparison suite is opt-in.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run only for model comparison claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: GLM model e2e requires RUN_CLOUD_MODEL_TESTS.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for GLM provider claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Kimi model e2e requires RUN_CLOUD_MODEL_TESTS.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for Kimi provider claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: LFM model e2e requires provider availability.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for LFM provider claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: MiniMax model e2e requires RUN_CLOUD_MODEL_TESTS.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for MiniMax provider claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: MiniMax highspeed model e2e requires RUN_CLOUD_MODEL_TESTS.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for MiniMax provider claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: MiniMax model e2e requires RUN_CLOUD_MODEL_TESTS.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for MiniMax provider claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Qwen local model e2e is skipped in CI or without local backend.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for Qwen/local-provider claims.

skippedOrGatedTests.reason: Qwen Coder local model e2e is skipped in CI or without local backend.
skippedOrGatedTests.action: Run for Qwen/local-provider claims.
